'''鈭歵h-y-w''' ('''thayawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lacquer|lacquer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lacquer|lacquer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-y-w
|-
! Lemma
| thayawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thayawithi|thayawithi]] || [[word:thayawiji|thayawiji]] || [[word:thayawishi|thayawishi]] || [[word:thayawi|thayawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayawuthuth|thayawuthuth]] || [[word:thayawujuj|thayawujuj]] || [[word:thayawushush|thayawushush]] || [[word:thayaw|thayaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawuthu|thayawuthu]] || [[word:thayawuju|thayawuju]] || [[word:thayawushu|thayawushu]] || [[word:thayawu|thayawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawufuth|thayawufuth]] || [[word:thayawufuj|thayawufuj]] || [[word:thayawufush|thayawufush]] || [[word:thayawuf|thayawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thayawethe|thayawethe]] || [[word:thayaweje|thayaweje]] || [[word:thayaweshe|thayaweshe]] || [[word:thayawe|thayawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayawothoth|thayawothoth]] || [[word:thayawojoj|thayawojoj]] || [[word:thayawoshosh|thayawoshosh]] || [[word:thayaw|thayaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawotho|thayawotho]] || [[word:thayawojo|thayawojo]] || [[word:thayawosho|thayawosho]] || [[word:thayawo|thayawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawofoth|thayawofoth]] || [[word:thayawofoj|thayawofoj]] || [[word:thayawofosh|thayawofosh]] || [[word:thayawof|thayawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thayaw忙th忙|thayaw忙th忙]] || [[word:thayaw忙j忙|thayaw忙j忙]] || [[word:thayaw忙sh忙|thayaw忙sh忙]] || [[word:thayaw忙|thayaw忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayawathath|thayawathath]] || [[word:thayawajaj|thayawajaj]] || [[word:thayawashash|thayawashash]] || [[word:thayaw|thayaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawatha|thayawatha]] || [[word:thayawaja|thayawaja]] || [[word:thayawasha|thayawasha]] || [[word:thayawa|thayawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawafath|thayawafath]] || [[word:thayawafaj|thayawafaj]] || [[word:thayawafash|thayawafash]] || [[word:thayawaf|thayawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thayawasha|thayawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothayawasha|gothayawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithayawasha|gokithayawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thayawn眉sha|thayawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothayawnkn眉sha|gothayawnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithayawn眉sha|gokithayawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thayawsh毛sha|thayawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothayawnksh毛sha|gothayawnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithayawsh毛sha|gokithayawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thayawrosha|thayawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothayawnkrosha|gothayawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithayawrosha|gokithayawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thayawmusha|thayawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayawnkmusha|gothayawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayawmusha|gokithayawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thayawsherasha|thayawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothayawnksherasha|gothayawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithayawsherasha|gokithayawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thayawngasha|thayawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothayawnkngasha|gothayawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithayawngasha|gokithayawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thayawyasha|thayawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothayawnkyasha|gothayawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithayawyasha|gokithayawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thayawyamasha|thayawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothayawnkyamasha|gothayawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithayawyamasha|gokithayawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thayawn眉sh毛sha|thayawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothayawnkn眉sh毛sha|gothayawnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithayawn眉sh毛sha|gokithayawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thayawn眉rosha|thayawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothayawnkn眉rosha|gothayawnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithayawn眉rosha|gokithayawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayawn眉musha|thayawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayawnkn眉musha|gothayawnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayawn眉musha|gokithayawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thayawsh毛n眉sha|thayawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothayawnksh毛n眉sha|gothayawnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithayawsh毛n眉sha|gokithayawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thayawsh毛rosha|thayawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothayawnksh毛rosha|gothayawnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithayawsh毛rosha|gokithayawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayawsh毛musha|thayawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayawnksh毛musha|gothayawnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayawsh毛musha|gokithayawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thayawron眉sha|thayawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothayawnkron眉sha|gothayawnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithayawron眉sha|gokithayawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thayawrosh毛sha|thayawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothayawnkrosh毛sha|gothayawnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithayawrosh毛sha|gokithayawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayawromusha|thayawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayawnkromusha|gothayawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayawromusha|gokithayawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thayawmun眉sha|thayawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothayawnkmun眉sha|gothayawnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithayawmun眉sha|gokithayawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thayawmush毛sha|thayawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothayawnkmush毛sha|gothayawnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithayawmush毛sha|gokithayawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thayawmurosha|thayawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothayawnkmurosha|gothayawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithayawmurosha|gokithayawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thayaw|thayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙y忙w|th忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothayaw|hothayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙y忙w|hoth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothayaw|hohothayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙y忙w|hohoth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thayaw|n眉thayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙y忙w|n眉th忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thayaw|n眉n眉thayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙y忙w|n眉n眉th忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thayaw|n茂thayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙y忙w|n茂th忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thayaw|n茂n茂thayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙y忙w|n茂n茂th忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthayaw|luthayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙y忙w|luth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthayaw|luluthayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙y忙w|luluth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithayaw|lithayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙y忙w|lith忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithayaw|lilithayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙y忙w|lilith忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothayaw|kothayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙y忙w|koth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothayaw|kokothayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙y忙w|kokoth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethayaw|kethayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙y忙w|keth忙y忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethayaw|kekethayaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙y忙w|keketh忙y忙w]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
